question: Rapid Financing Instrument and "Rapid Credit Facility" are related to the provisions of lending by which one of the following?

question: With reference to the Indian economy, consider the following statements: 1. An increase in Nominal Effective Exchange Rate (NEER) indicates the appreciation of rupee. 2. An increase in the Real Effective Exchange Rate (REER) indicates an improvement in trade competitiveness. 3. An increasing trend in domestic inflation relative to inflation in other countries is likely to cause an increasing divergence between NEER and REER. Which of the above statements are correct?

Which of the statements given above are correct?

question: The often-discussed 'indirect transfer' in India relates to which situation?
option_a: An Indian company having invested in a foreign venture and remitting the profits back to the foreign country

option_c: An Indian company buying assets abroad and selling them at a profit which is then remitted back to India
option_d: A foreign company issuing shares and deriving its value from the assets located in India

question: “Climate Action Tracker” which monitors the emission reduction pledges of different countries is a :

question:
Consider the following statements :

2. The International Energy Agency in partnership with the Climate Group launched a global initiative “EP100”.
3. EP100 brings together leading companies committed to driving innovation in energy efficiency and increasing competitiveness while delivering on emission reduction goals.
4. Some Indian companies are members of EP100.
5. The International Energy Agency is the Secretariat to the “Under2 Coalition”. Which of the statements given above are correct ?
If the rainforests and tropical forests are the lungs of the earth, then surely the wetlands are its kidneys. Which one of the following statements best reflects the role of wetlands?
option_a: Wetlands play a vital role in the hydrological cycle with processes such as evapotranspiration, surface runoff and groundwater recharge.
option_b: They are a nutrient source on which fish, crustaceans (crabs), mollusks, birds, and mammals feed; plants and fruits are produced.
option_c: Wetlands help maintain water balance and soil stabilization and play a crucial role.
option_d: Aquatic plants absorb heavy metals and nutrients and retain them.

question: With reference to WHO air quality guidelines, consider the following statements:

option_b: In any year, the peak ozone concentration should not exceed the threshold of 100 ppb for 8 hours.
option_c: PM10 can penetrate deep into the lungs causing breathing and respiratory problems.
option_d: Highly active ozone denuders are used to oxidize organic pollutants into stable products.

question:
In India, what is the role of the Coal Controller's Organization (CCO)?
1. CCO is the major source of Coal Statistics in Government of India.
2. It monitors progress of development of Captive Coal/Lignite blocks.
3. It hears any objection to the Government's notification relating to acquisition of coal-bearing areas.
4. It ensures that coal mining companies deliver the coal to end users in the prescribed time.
If a particular area is brought under the Fifth Schedule of the Constitution of India, which one of the following statements best reflects the consequence of it?
option_a: This would prevent the transfer of land of tribal people to non-tribal people.
option_b: This would create a local self-governing body in that area.
option_c: This would convert that area into a Union Territory.
option_d: The State having such areas would be declared a Special Category State.

question: Consider the following statements: 1. The Swachh Bharat Mission (Urban) is a platform to promote urban sanitation and is funded by the Government of India and the World Health Organization. 2. The National Urban Development Agency is the apex body in the Government of India for housing and urban development, and this city provides solutions to India's urban challenges and provides new solutions.

Traditionally, its meetings are held in March, June and September every year. 3. This Committee presents a report to the General Assembly for approval and assesses the credentials of all UN members.
Which one of the following statements best describes the 'Polar Code' ?
option_a: It is the international code of safety for ships operating in polar waters.
option_b: It is the agreement of the countries around the North Pole regarding the demarcation of their territories in the polar region.
option_c: It is a set of norms to be followed by the countries whose scientists undertake research studies in the North Pole and South Pole.
option_d: It is a trade and security agreement of the member countries of the Arctic Council.

question:
With reference to the United Nations General Assembly, consider the following statements :
1. The UN General Assembly can grant observer status to the non-member States.
2. Inter-governmental organisations can seek observer status in the UN General Assembly.
3. Permanent Observers in the UN General Assembly can maintain missions at the UN headquarters.
Which of the statements given above are correct ?

option_a: 1. Tea Board is a statutory body.
option_b: It is attached to the Ministry of Agriculture & Farmers Welfare.
option_c: The headquarters of Tea Board is located in Bengaluru.
option_d: The Board has overseas offices in Dubai and Moscow.

question: Which one of the following is the best description of the term 'Greenwashing'?
option_a: It is a form of disinformation to present the impression that a company’s products are eco-friendly and environmentally appropriate.
option_b: It is a form of disinformation to present the impression that a country’s annual financial details do not include ecological/ environmental costs.
option_c: It is a method of making a basic structure while ignoring harmful environmental consequences.
option_d: It is a method of attaching environmental costs to all the government projects/ programmes.

question: Consider the following statements : 1. High clouds primarily reflect solar radiation and cool the surface of the Earth. 2. Low clouds have a high absorption of infrared radiation emanating from the Earth's surface and thus cause warming effect. Which of the statements given above is/are correct ?

Some people who fled from civil war in Somalia live in Dadaab refugee complex in Kenya. Which of the statements given above is/are correct ?

Consider the following statements: 1. Gujarat has the largest solar park in India. 2. Kerala has a fully solar powered international airport. 3. Goa has India's largest floating solar power project.

With reference to the United Nations Convention on the Law of the Sea (UNCLOS), consider the following statements: 1. A coastal State may, by agreement with any State or States whose coasts are not opposite or not adjacent to its own coast, establish an EEZ beyond the 200 nautical miles from the baselines from which the breadth of its territorial sea is measured. 2. All States, whether or not they are coastal States, have the right to freedom of navigation and overflight, and the laying of submarine cables and pipelines beyond the territorial sea, subject to the conditions laid down in the Convention. 3. The contiguous zone may not extend beyond 24 nautical miles from the baselines from which the breadth of the territorial sea is measured.

When a wild life is declared to be protected then this animal whether in protected area or outside, is entitled to equal protection. 3. For a wild life protected under the law, a reasonable threat to its life or property is sufficient ground to capture or kill the animal.
Which one of the following insects is a pest which is used as a biocontrol agent?
किसके राज्यकाल में 'योगवशिष्ठ' का निजामुद्दीन पानीपती द्वारा फ़ारसी में अनुवाद किया गया ?

हाल ही में हैदराबाद में भारत के प्रधान मंत्री द्वारा रामानुज की आसन मुद्रा में विश्व की दूसरी सबसे ऊंची मूर्ति का उद्घाटन किया गया था। निम्नलिखित कथनों में कौन-सा एक, रामानुज की शिक्षाओं को सही निरूपित करता है ?
option_a: मोक्ष प्राप्ति का सर्वोत्तम साधन भक्ति था।
option_b: वेद शाश्वत, आत्म-प्रतिष्ठित तथा पूर्णतया प्रामाणिक हैं।
option_c: तर्कसंगत युक्तियाँ सर्वोच्च आनंद के मौलिक माध्यम थे।
option_d: ध्यान के माध्यम से मोक्ष पाया जा सकता था।

question:
हाल ही में, प्रधान मंत्री ने वेरावल में सोमनाथ मंदिर के निकट नए सर्किट हाउस का उद्घाटन किया था। सोमनाथ मंदिर के बारे में निम्नलिखित कथनों में कौन-से सही हैं ?
1. सोमनाथ मंदिर ज्योतिर्लिंग देव-मंदिरों में से एक है।
2. अल-बुरूनी ने सोमनाथ मंदिर का वर्णन किया है।
3. सोमनाथ मंदिर की प्राण-प्रतिष्ठा (आज के मंदिर की स्थापना) राष्ट्रपति एस. राधाकृष्णन द्वारा की गई थी।
